title: Ledyard: A Short Film
description: A 15-minute documentary short following three members of the Ledyard Canoe Club through a season on the Connecticut River. Shooting begins in spring term. Looking for collaborators passionate about outdoor storytelling and willing to wake up before sunrise.

title: Hop Stop — Original Musical
description: An original musical set in and around the Hopkins Center during finals week. Script is written, songs are drafted. Looking for a music director to arrange and a choreographer to bring it to life for a spring production.

title: Unseen Dartmouth — Photo Series
description: A photo essay series documenting campus spaces and communities that rarely appear in official Dartmouth media. Looking for a co-photographer with a documentary eye and a writer to develop captions and narrative text.

title: Midnight EP
description: Recording a 5-track indie folk EP this term in the Rauner recording studio. Three tracks are fully arranged, two are still in progress. Need a bassist for studio sessions and someone who can mix the final tracks.
